SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http

Class MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C>

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C>
Type Parameters:
C - config type driving the profile
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C> extends Object implements AutoCloseable
High-level runtime profile for named MagicWebSocketClient instances.

      C - config type
      Parameters:
      runtime - runtime that owns the client
      name - runtime component name
      configClass - config class driving the client
